Meet Your CPA Team
Great CPAs always pay for themselves. That’s why we hire only the best talent in the industry
—to deliver exceptional results for our clients.
Our Elite Team
Sherman Standberry, CPA
– CEO & Managing Partner
One of the most sought-after CPAs in the country, Sherman Standberry is the visionary CEO and Founder of My CPA Coach, a premier tax consulting firm specializing in strategic tax planning. Renowned for his ability to simplify complex tax strategies, Sherman has educated and empowered over 10 million taxpayers through online tax education. Now leading a team of top-tier CPAs, he helps business owners legally minimize their tax burdens while maximizing their financial potential.
Areas of Expertise
Tax Planning, Business Growth, Accounting, Investing
Credentials
Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Master of Professional Accountancy (MPA)
Education
MPA & BS in Accounting, Georgia State University
Experience
15+ years
Accomplishments:
Lead Instructor of the Tax Savers Course
Inc. 5000 Entrepreneur (2019-2021)
Featured in Yahoo Small Business, CBS, Fox Business, and AccountingWEB
Goldie Hall, EA, CPA
– Senior Tax Manager
With Fortune 500 leadership experience, Goldie Hall has led and developed over 30 tax professionals, delivering world-class tax services. As a Senior Tax Manager at My CPA Coach, Goldie works directly with business owners to implement strategic tax planning, preparation, and compliance solutions—helping them reduce tax liabilities and eliminate financial stress.
Areas of Expertise
Tax Planning, Tax Preparation, Business Compliance
Education
BS in Accounting, Fisk University
Credentials
Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Enrolled Agent (EA)
Experience
15+ years
Accomplishments:
Led and managed a 30-person tax team for a Fortune 500 company
5+ years of consulting high-net-worth individuals
10+ years in private accounting & corporate taxation
Aaron Guinn, MBA, CPA
– Tax Manager
A versatile CPA with an extensive background in public accounting, CFO services, and taxation, Aaron Guinn has worked with mid-sized companies to optimize their tax strategies, audits, and financial reporting. Passionate about helping business owners, he now serves as Tax Manager at My CPA Coach, guiding clients toward lower taxes, accurate filings, and better financial outcomes.
Areas of Expertise
CFO Services, Tax Planning, Accounting
Credentials
Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Master of Business Administration (MBA)
Education
BS in Accounting, East Tennessee State University
Experience
20+ years
Accomplishments:
CFO & management experience overseeing multiple companies & 50+ employees
10+ years inpublic accounting (taxation, audit, and business advisory)
Rafael Valverde, CPA
– Tax Manager
An experienced CPA and true Master of Accounting and Taxation, Rafael Valverde boasts Big 4 Tax Accounting experience where he routinely dealt with complex tax matters ranging from several million to billion-dollar transactions. As a Tax Manager at My CPA Coach, he coaches our clients on the best ways to reduce tax exposure, improve financial clarity, and build efficient, repeatable systems that support confident decision-making and long-term growth.
Areas of Expertise
Tax Compliance & Strategic Planning, Financial Reporting & Multi-Entity Structures, REIT Testing, Data, Process, and Workflow Automation
Credentials
Certified Public Accountant (CPA)
Education
Master of Accountancy, DePaul University (Magna Cum Laude), Bachelor of Science in Accountancy
Experience
10+ years
Accomplishments:
Led and scaled a tax department that managed over 240 entities and 600+ K-1's
Implemented REIT testing across 90+ properties, generating over $100,000 in annual tax savings
Developed and executed ERC processes, resulting in approximately $1M in tax credits
Former Senior Tax Accountant at Ernst & Young, supporting large-scale REITs and complex multi-entity clients
Manuel Deanda, CPA
– Tax Manager
As a seasoned financial leader with over a decade of combined CFO and Tax experience, Manuel DeAnda brings a unique ability to connect executive-level financial strategy with tax compliance. As a CPA and Tax Manager at My CPA Coach, Manuel works directly with clients to develop tax strategies that support long-term profitability and sustainable growth. With experience across individual, corporate, and partnership taxation, he helps business owners minimize tax liabilities and navigate complex compliance requirements.
Areas of Expertise
Tax Compliance & Strategic Planning, GAAP Financial Reporting, Multi-Entity Accounting, Budgeting & Forecasting
Credentials
Certified Public Accountant (CPA)
Education
BA in Accounting, Trinity International University
Experience
10+ years
Accomplishments:
Combined CFO, Controller, and Tax Manager leadership experience across multiple industries
Extensive experience preparing and reviewing individual, corporate, and partnership tax returns
Led end-to-end accounting operations with GAAP-compliant financial reporting and tax-ready financials
Provided executive-level financial strategy including tax planning, budgeting, forecasting, and long-term planning
Experienced in managing multi-entity accounting environments and aligning tax strategy with operational decision-making
Krystal Standberry, CPA
Partner & CFO
As the co-founder and CFO of My CPA Coach, Krystal Standberry is the architect of the firm’s tax preparation and planning frameworks, which have helped clients save millions in taxes annually. With Big 4 experience and a track record of consulting billion-dollar corporations, she is an expert in complex tax planning and business operations.
Areas of Expertise
Tax Strategy, Business Operations, Accounting
Credentials
Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Master of Professional Accountancy (MPA)
Education
MPA & BS in Accounting, Georgia State University
Experience
15+ years
Accomplishments:
Big 4 Public Accounting Experience in taxation
Founder & Co-host of LYFE Accounting
Featured in Business Insider, AccountingWEB, and Clutch
Why Choose My CPA Coach?
Proven Tax Savings
Our firm has helped business owners save millions through proactive tax strategies.
Elite-Level Expertise
Our CPAs and consultants bring Big 4 experience, Fortune 500 leadership, and CFO expertise to every client.
Results-Driven Approach
We go beyond tax compliance; we focus on minimizing your taxes and maximizing your profits
Ready to take control of your taxes and financial future?
Schedule a Consultation Today
My CPA Coach connects taxpayers to high-performing CPAs that guarantee results. Our CPAs specialize in high-value tax planning and tax preparation services for small businesses and high-income individuals.

Your Message
Important Disclosures:
Tax Planning Guarantee: We will refund up to 100% of our tax planning fee upon all of the following conditions being present: 1) Your plan does not identify at least double the price of the plan in estimated tax savings 2) Your business earns over $100,000 per year in revenue 3) You provided all required information to create your tax plan.
Tax Preparation Guarantee: We will refund up to 100% of our tax preparation service for any interest or penalties related to the accuracy of our filing of your tax return. To be eligible for any refund, the inaccuracy on your tax return must be directly caused by our firm. Direct causes include, but are not limited to, data inserted on the tax return that does not correlate with the information provided by the Client. Inaccuracies from indirect causes are not covered by this guarantee. Indirect causes include, but are not limited to, tax return inaccuracies due to incorrect information provided by the client. This guarantee does not include interest and penalties resulting from late filings.
